nasb.text: and they will kill Him, and He will be raised on the third day.” And they were deeply grieved.

esv.text: and they will kill him, and he will be raised on the third day.” And they were greatly distressed.

cnv.text: 他們要殺害他，第三天他要復活。”他們就很憂愁。

ccb.text: 他们将杀害祂，第三天祂将复活。”门徒听了，十分忧愁。

csbs.text: 他们要杀害他，然后在第三天，他要复活。”门徒们就极其忧伤。
